description_long: This is a Craftsman-style house with a dark green exterior, white trim, and a prominent gabled roof. The house features a covered front porch supported by white columns, a brick chimney, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with multi-pane sashes and decorative trim. The property includes a manicured lawn, concrete walkways, and a blacktop driveway. The overall structure is two stories tall, with the second story partially set back and integrated into the roofline. The house sits on a rectangular plot with clear boundaries for the yard and driveway.
description: A two-story Craftsman-style house with a dark green exterior, white trim, gabled roof, covered porch, and attached garage on a manicured lot.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and attached garage with driveway.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage door, driveway, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear-right view showing the back of the house, rear windows, and a small porch area.
description_view_3: Direct front view emphasizing the main entryway, porch columns, and symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with white columns, steps, and a central door framed by decorative trim
